bird.summary: The many-colored fruit dove (Ptilinopus perousii), also known as manuma in the Samoan language, is a species of bird in the family Columbid…

locations.name: 太平洋
locations.summary: 太平洋（英語：Pacific Ocean）是地球上五大洋中面積最大的洋，面積約為1.65億平方公里，從北冰洋一直延伸至南冰洋，西側為亞洲，西南為大洋洲，東面為美洲。它覆蓋了地球約46%的水面和32%的總面積，超過所有陸地面積的總和。赤道將…

locations.name: 斐濟
locations.summary: 斐濟共和國（英語：Republic of Fiji；斐濟語：Matanitu Tugalala o Viti；斐濟印地語：रिपब्लिक ऑफ फीजी），通稱斐濟，是位於南太平洋，瓦努阿圖以東、東加以西、吐瓦魯以南的群島國家，由322…

locations.name: 萨摩亚群岛
locations.summary: 萨摩亚群岛（英語：Samoan Islands 或 Samoa Islands，舊稱Navigators' Islands）位於南太平洋，是波里尼西亞的一部分。约当南纬13°-15°、西经168°-173°之间，人口约250,000，主要…

locations.name: 東加
locations.summary: 汤加王国（東加語：Pule'anga Fakatu'i 'o Tonga；英語：Kingdom of Tonga），通称汤加，是一個位於太平洋西南部由172個大小不等的島嶼組成的島嶼國家。 西距斐濟650公里，西南距紐西蘭1770公里，面…

relations.subject: Many-colored fruit dove

relations.subject: Many-colored fruit dove
relations.evidence: In the 1990s, there were 50 individuals on Tutuila reported. Biologists with the American Samoa Department of Marine and Wildlife Resources and workers from Pacific Bird Conservation and the Toledo Zoo captured four many-colored fruit dove to begin a captive breeding project at Association of Zoos and Aquariums facilities. The many-colored fruit dove chief food source, the banyan fruit, are also in decline due to deforestation and their susceptibility to storm damage
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

relations.subject: Many-colored fruit dove
relations.evidence: Hunting is another cause of the bird's decline on Tutuila
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
